subcodes.title: Words to a friend of Mrs. Struven, spoken on
subcodes.first_line: When ‘Abdu’l-Bahá writes tablets, he is calling the souls to a station which they are potentially able to attain. I does not mean that they have attained that station at the time of the writing.
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
